description_long: This object consists of two sets of outdoor beach furniture, each including a reclining lounge chair, a matching footstool, and a large round sun umbrella. The first set features a blue fabric seat and umbrella, while the second set is beige. Both chairs have wooden frames with a slanted design for comfortable lounging, and the footstools are similarly constructed with matching fabric. The umbrellas are supported by slender metal poles and provide ample shade. The fabric on the chairs and umbrellas appears to be weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor use. The overall design is lightweight and portable, ideal for parks, beaches, or urban relaxation areas.
description: A pair of outdoor lounge chair sets with matching footstools and large round umbrellas, one in blue and one in beige, featuring wooden frames and weather-resistant fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lounge chairs, footstools, and umbrellas clearly, highlighting the blue and beige color differences.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view revealing the slanted design of the chairs and the round shape of the umbrellas.
description_view_2: Top view focusing on the circular umbrellas and the arrangement of the chairs and footstools beneath them.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the backs of the chairs and the underside of the umbrellas.
